title: botryanthus neglectus
intro: Botryanthus neglectus, also known as the Yellow Hoya, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Botryanthus neglectus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
